approach: Gemini 3.1 Flash multi-reference shelf generation -> JC manual labeling -> retrain YOLO11m
notes: Generation running on 2 VMs, 100% success. JC test-labeled 10 images (90/100 quality). Retrain pipeline ready. Butler building labeling GUI. Conf/IOU sweeps done (marginal). Confusion analysis shows similar-product variants are the bottleneck.
